events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce answer JSON. No local amendment/drawing note forbids. References site standard work, TWI. Need evaluate field condition and return decision. Since less tidy but complies with instructions and requirements, no defect/hazard. Decision pass. Risk low. Work_stage in-progress. Component conditions none. Percent_complete maybe 50? We don't know, but in-progress; estimate 50. Value 0. Confidence 0.9. Event_time, rate, sound_source defaults 0/empty. Order empty, workable empty. Findings empty. Actions: none needed; maybe document accept. Rationale. References site standard work, TWI. Need raw JSON. Ensure no prose, no markdown.
